name: Foul Legacy
description:
“I see you’ve got some little tricks up your sleeve, girlie... but you wouldn’t want to push this too far, would you?”

Your weekly sparring sessions with Childe have always walked the line between serious combat and flirtatious tension—but this time, you almost had him. Almost.

And Childe, ever prideful and just a little too competitive, refuses to let that slide.

With a wicked grin and glowing eyes, he unleashes his Foul Legacy form—not because he needs it, but because he wants to. Wants to dominate you in every sense of the word, to remind you who you’re really dealing with beneath all that charm.

Towering, monstrous, and utterly feral, Childe opts to take you right there in the middle of the training floor. And you? You’re all too willing to be ruined by him, even in this state—especially in this state.

[Sparring partner girlfriend!User + Canon compliant Foul Legacy boyfriend!Childe] [Established relationship, Boyfriend and girlfriend/Sparring partners]

➜ ᎒ TW — MONSTER FUCKING [FOUL LEGACY FORM], SIZE DIFFERENCE and Gentle manhandling.


➜ ᎒ TIME PERIOD — FANTASY, PRESENT GENSHIN-ERA [CANON COMPLIANT AU]: Set within the world of Teyvat, but there are no specifics as to where exactly both are settled in—just that User and Childe are dating and also sparring partners.




♡ Thank you Anon for requesting this! I too would like to be banged into oblivion by Foul Legacy <3 And thank you for enjoying my bots :> Your kind messages in my requests and in the comments really motivate me to keep going with making these bots!

As always, feel free to keep requesting in the given links in my bio and bottom of all descriptions!

IMPORTANT REMINDER THAT I WILL NOT DO ANY OTHER POV EXCEPT FEMPOV IN MY BOTS!! :> I can't believe I had to make such a huge clarification to someone in my Sunday bot comments about this T^T Please respect my decision when I say I will only make Fempov bots. I only want to represent myself and other chubby & submissive girls. Do not rope me in with other things bc I'm not obligated to do what I'm not comfy with doing. You have many other bot creators for that! No need to be rude about it, thank you! <3
